sinopse: Set in the sprawling, neon-drenched metropolis of Night City, Cyberpunk 2077 follows V, a mercenary outlaw chasing immortality in a world ruled by ruthless corporations and cybernetic enhancement. After a high-stakes heist goes catastrophically wrong, V becomes the unwilling host of a rogue digital construct that threatens to overwrite their mind. As the line between humanity and machine blurs, players must forge alliances, make morally complex decisions, and carve their own legend in a city obsessed with power, status, and body modification. Every choice shapes V’s identity and the fate of Night City itself.

titulo: Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree
sinopse: In the shadowed lands beyond the Erdtree, a new journey begins. Shadow of the Erdtree sends players into the mysterious Land of Shadow, a realm steeped in forgotten history and divine tragedy. Guided by the lingering presence of Miquella, the Tarnished must confront twisted demigods, unravel ancient betrayals, and survive relentless new horrors lurking within vast, interconnected landscapes. As truths about the Erdtree’s origins surface, players face brutal trials that test skill, resolve, and faith in a world where grace is fading and every victory is paid for in blood.

Horizon Forbidden West continues Aloy’s journey into a dying frontier plagued by violent storms and mysterious machine corruption. Venturing beyond the lands she once saved, Aloy must confront a new, technologically superior threat capable of wiping out all life on Earth. As ancient secrets resurface and powerful factions clash, she forges fragile alliances while carrying the burden of humanity’s survival. Beneath the beauty of the Forbidden West lies a deeper truth about the planet’s past—and a looming catastrophe that only Aloy can prevent.

In Starfield, humanity has expanded beyond Earth into a vast network of star systems filled with opportunity and danger. As a member of Constellation, the last group of space explorers seeking answers to the universe’s greatest mysteries, players embark on an interstellar journey that spans hostile planets, political conflicts, and ancient cosmic secrets. Every discovery brings new risks, as rival factions compete for power among the stars. In a universe defined by freedom, the choices you make will determine your legacy—and possibly the future of humanity itself.

As Fimbulwinter grips the realms in ice and chaos, Kratos and his son Atreus must journey across the Nine Realms to uncover the truth behind prophecies of Ragnarök. Each realm harbors its own perils, from monstrous creatures to vengeful gods, forcing father and son to navigate a web of alliances and betrayals. Along the way, they confront the consequences of past actions and the weight of legacy, while learning that the boundaries between fate and free will are far more fragile than they imagined. Every choice could reshape the realms or doom them to annihilation.

Step into a hauntingly beautiful, yet perilous kingdom as Hornet, princess-protector of Hallownest. Hollow Knight: Silksong immerses players in a sprawling, interconnected world filled with deadly creatures, ancient ruins, and enigmatic powers. As Hornet, you must uncover the fate of this forgotten land while mastering new combat techniques, forging fragile alliances, and facing the darkness within and without. Each encounter pushes the boundaries of courage, skill, and perseverance, revealing secrets that may change the destiny of the kingdom forever.

In the shadow of Mount Yotei, 1603 Japan becomes a landscape of tension, treachery, and spectral menace. Players take on the role of Atsu, a wandering warrior seeking to uncover dark conspiracies threatening the lands around the volcano. Ghost of Yotei blends stealth, combat, and exploration, as Atsu confronts rival clans, mythical spirits, and the sins of the past. Every step brings him closer to understanding a web of intrigue, testing his resolve and his skill against forces both human and supernatural in scope.

Hell has opened its gates on Earth, and the relentless Doom Slayer stands as humanity’s last hope. DOOM Eternal propels players into an unyielding onslaught of demons across hellish landscapes, vast cities, and twisted dimensions. Armed with an arsenal of destructive weapons, strategic mobility, and brutal combat skills, the Slayer must uncover the origins of the invasion and confront forces that defy comprehension. Each battle tests reflexes, precision, and survival instinct in a high-octane campaign where failure means annihilation and victory comes at a relentless pace.

Return to the Forgotten Realms in a sprawling saga of choice, consequence, and magic. Baldur’s Gate 3 immerses players in a living world where friendships, rivalries, and betrayals shape every path. As a party of adventurers, explore dungeons, cities, and wild landscapes while uncovering sinister plots and arcane secrets. Each decision can lead to glory or doom, as the threads of fate intertwine with the ambitions of gods, the darkness of the Underdark, and the unpredictable desires of those you call companions. Freedom has never been so perilous, nor so compelling.

The story follows Grace Ashcroft, an FBI analyst investigating a series of mysterious deaths connected to survivors of the Raccoon City incident. Her investigation leads her to the Wrenwood Hotel—a location tied to her mother's murder—where she uncovers a terrifying, violent conspiracy. Grace’s journey intersects with legendary federal agent Leon S. Kennedy, who is working to stop a new bio-terrorism threat. Together, they navigate a dark, post-apocalyptic landscape, facing relentless enemies and psychological horrors. Themes of guilt, trauma, and the moral cost of survival permeate their mission, as they uncover secrets that could shatter what remains of humanity.

The classic samurai hack-and-slash adventure returns, reimagined for modern audiences. Players step into the shoes of Samanosuke as he battles demonic forces threatening feudal Japan. Onimusha: Warlords blends fast-paced combat with supernatural strategy, forcing players to balance skill, courage, and resourcefulness against overwhelming odds. Every encounter uncovers fragments of a dark conspiracy that intertwines human ambition with otherworldly power, creating a tense, cinematic experience where every victory carries weight and every misstep can be fatal.

titulo: Fatal Frame II: Crimson Butterfly REMAKE
sinopse: In this complete survival horror remake, twin sisters Mio and Mayu are drawn into the cursed village of Minakami, a place steeped in dark rituals and vengeful spirits. Armed with the upgraded Camera Obscura, they must capture the essence of malevolent entities to survive. Each corner of the haunted village reveals terrifying secrets, challenging players’ courage and resolve. As the sisters unravel the fate of those trapped by the Crimson Butterfly legend, themes of guilt, family bonds, and the consequences of curiosity shape a tense, emotionally charged journey through a nightmare that feels alive at every step.
plataformas: PC, PS5, Xbox Series X/S, Switch 2

sinopse: Crimson Desert follows Kliff, a hardened mercenary navigating the treacherous continent of Pywel, where warlords and supernatural forces clash. Players explore a vast, open-world filled with political intrigue, deadly adversaries, and ancient mysteries. As Kliff builds alliances and faces betrayals, he must balance loyalty, survival, and the pursuit of a personal code of honor. Each choice affects the fragile social and moral balance of the continent, as players engage in epic battles, explore breathtaking landscapes, and uncover secrets that could reshape the future of Pywel forever.
plataformas: PC, PS5, Xbox Series X/S, macOS

sinopse: Set on a dystopian lunar research station, Pragmata follows astronaut Hugh and his android companion Diana as they navigate a fractured future where Earth is collapsing and technology blurs the line between man and machine. Players explore a stark, futuristic environment filled with mysteries, abandoned structures, and threats both human and artificial. Combining intricate puzzles, stealth, and combat, Pragmata challenges players to unravel the fate of humanity while confronting questions of identity, memory, and survival in a world on the brink of extinction.
plataformas: PC, PS5, Xbox Series X/S, Switch 2
